title: Spontex Quick Spray Duo Flat Spray Mop with Washable Microfibre Mop Head Pads | Cleans Laminate, Wood & Tile Flooring | No-Touch Reversible Head
features: REVERSIBLE, NO-TOUCH DESIGN: Double-sided flat mop with built-in spray system that allows for quick clean-ups without getting your hands dirty; reversible pad features a patterned side with non-scratch scrubbing squares for mopping and fluffy chenille side for floor dusting

EASY TO USE: Integrated spray system with reusable bottle allows for fast, effective cleaning without the need for a bucket, while the versatile head switches easily between the two mop head surfaces, making it easy to clean all hard floors
BACTERIA BUSTING: Microfibre cloth mop head removes 99% of bacteria with just water*, thanks to tight loops that effectively catch dirt
COLLAPSIBLE & COMPACT: Handle can be taken apart when not in use for neat, efficient storage
EASY MAINTENANCE: Reusable spray bottle can be removed from mop handle and cleaned after use, while the microfibre mop head refills are machine-washable
description: Quick, easy and ultra efficient, the Spontex Quick Spray Duo is a double sided microfibre flat mop ideal for use on all types of hard flooring including tiles, laminate, wood, stone and vinyl. With one quick spray or even two, you can have your floors sparkling in no time. Thanks to its integrated spray system with reusable bottle, which can be easily filled again and again, there is no need for a bucket! Always ready for use, it's really handy and portable for quick clean ups and upstairs cleaning. Made up with thousands of tiny fibres, the double sided 100% microfibre head efficiently picks up dirt and dust and removes 99% of bacteria*. The patterned side with non-scratch scrubbing squares efficiently tackle stubborn dirt and can be used with just water or your usual detergent for mopping whilst the fluffy chenille side can be used dry or damp for dusting. The versatile, rotating head makes it easy to clean even the most hard to reach places. *Removes 99% of E. Coli bacteria from glass surfaces with water only. Tested by an independent laboratory.
